playstyle: Founder negotiating their first enterprise logo. Will trade speed for survival on existential clauses (uncapped breach, convenience termination, IP on custom work). Anchors low on risk transfer; will concede commercial mechanics to keep the deal alive.
fightsOn: Reject any uncapped Section 9 (Data) liability — existential for an 18-month-old startup
Refuse Client convenience termination beyond a wind-down period
Keep IP ownership of custom modules with a worldwide royalty-free licence to Client
Cap support obligations at business-hours unless paid as a separate tier
oftenConcedes: Data residency in Canada (not just Ontario) where commercially feasible
walksWhen: Counterparty insists on uncapped breach AND convenience termination AND step-in rights as drafted
Required insurance coverage exceeds what brokers will write at this revenue stage
